description: AI Chat Button Redesign + Voice Mode Inside Chat Panel. (1) Replace the gradient FAB circle in dashboard/layout.tsx with a subtle matte button. Add a small chat icon in the TopBar right section (before the avatar) -- minimal, no gradients, no glow. Remove the fixed bottom-24 right-6 FAB entirely. (2) Modify VoiceMode to render INLINE inside the chat panel instead of a full-screen overlay. When mic is clicked in ChatExperience, replace the message area with the voice UI (mic button + listening indicator). When done, switch back to chat messages.
steps: In frontend/app/dashboard/layout.tsx: Remove the entire fixed bottom-24 right-6 FAB button div (the gradient circle with MessageCircle/X icons). Instead, pass chatOpen and setChatOpen as props or via context so TopBar can trigger it.
In frontend/components/layout/AppShell.tsx: Accept new props onChatToggle and chatOpen, pass them to TopBar.

In frontend/components/layout/TopBar.tsx: Add a new matte chat toggle button in the right section (between the search button and connection indicator). Use MessageCircle icon from lucide-react, 16px. Style: rounded-lg p-2 bg-[var(--surface)] border border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-hover)]. When chatOpen, use accent-500 text color to indicate active state. No gradients, no glow.

In frontend/components/voice/VoiceMode.tsx: Remove the fixed inset-0 z-50 full-screen overlay wrapper. Instead, make it render as an inline component (relative positioning, full width/height of its parent). Remove the close button (parent will handle showing/hiding). Keep the mic button, listening indicator, and phase logic intact. Accept the same props but render without the AnimatePresence fixed overlay.

In frontend/components/chat/ChatExperience.tsx: Instead of rendering VoiceMode as a fixed overlay at the bottom, render it INLINE where the message area would be. When voiceActive is true, hide MessageList and show VoiceMode in its place (same flex-1 container). When voiceActive is false, show messages normally.
acceptance_criteria: No gradient FAB circle button visible at bottom-right of dashboard
TopBar shows a matte chat icon button that opens/closes the AI chat panel
Clicking mic in chat panel replaces message area with inline voice UI (no full-screen overlay)
Voice mode shows mic button and listening indicator within the chat panel bounds
Escape still closes the chat panel
npm run build passes without errors
